reasons: Khufra can punish Roger's chase and mobility path.
Bouncing Ball is strong into dive heroes who need blink-style movement across the frontline.

proof.summary: Roger wants to dive and chase with wolf-form mobility, while Khufra can interrupt blink-style movement and slow the entry path.
worksBestWhen: Khufra positions between Roger and the carry.
Khufra waits for Roger's commit instead of using Bouncing Ball too early.
failureCases: Roger waits out Khufra's anti-dash window.
Khufra is controlled before Roger enters.

reasons: Kaja can suppress Roger before or after he dives.
This prevents Roger from freely using movement and execute timing.

proof.summary: Roger wants to enter, chase, and finish targets, while Kaja can suppress him and drag him into team damage.
worksBestWhen: Kaja waits until Roger commits wolf form.
Team burst is ready during suppression.
failureCases: Roger baits Kaja ultimate with human-form poke.
Kaja cannot reach Roger through frontline spacing.

reasons: Franco can suppress Roger during his dive timing.
Hook and suppression force Roger to respect fog and reduce his freedom to invade.

proof.summary: Roger wants to choose when to enter wolf form and chase, while Franco can punish predictable paths with hook or suppression.
worksBestWhen: Franco tracks Roger's jungle entry path.
Franco saves Bloody Hunt for Roger's commit.
failureCases: Roger dodges hook and waits out suppression threat.
Franco catches Roger when Roger's team can counter-engage.

reasons: Valir can knock Roger back when Roger tries to enter wolf-form melee range.
Slow and range pressure make it harder for Roger to stick to targets.

proof.summary: Roger wants to close distance and finish low-HP targets, while Valir can push him away and slow his chase.
worksBestWhen: Valir saves Searing Torrent for Roger's actual dive.
Valir stays near teammates who can punish the displaced Roger.
failureCases: Valir wastes knockback on Roger's poke phase.

reasons: Silvanna can restrain Roger after he commits.
Her ultimate can limit Roger's ability to freely chase or reset out of the fight.

proof.summary: Roger wants to dive in and reposition for execute pressure, while Silvanna can trap him in a restricted zone after his commit.
worksBestWhen: Silvanna catches Roger after he uses mobility.
Teammates can follow up inside the ultimate zone.
failureCases: Roger times untargetability to avoid the engage.
Silvanna traps Roger while his team wins the surrounding fight.
